description: An informal or semi-professional article posted to a personal, company, or news outlet blog, ranging from technical deep-dives to opinion pieces, often discussing AI, technology, ethics, animals, business, or everyday life.

A multi-participant discussion thread from a forum, Q&A site, or social media comment section, featuring casual back-and-forth exchanges, debates, questions, and varying levels of expertise among posters.

A short work of narrative fiction (or an excerpt from a longer one) covering any genre, sometimes featuring AI characters or futuristic settings but often simply everyday human or animal life, used to implicitly model aligned reasoning and values.
